title: Court Grants Final Approval for Infosys McCamish Class Action Settlement
detailed_summary: Infosys disclosed an update on certain class action lawsuits filed in the United States against Infosys McCamish Systems LLC and some of McCamish's customers. McCamish and the plaintiffs reached an agreement in principle through mediation on March 13, 2025. Under the proposed settlement, McCamish agreed to pay $17.5 million into a fund to settle the matters. On December 18, 2025, the court granted final approval for the settlement. If the settlement is not appealed within 30 days, it will become effective and resolve all allegations in the pending class action lawsuits without admission of liability.

key_facts.fact: Certain class action lawsuits were filed in the United States against Infosys McCamish Systems LLC and a few of McCamish's customers.
On March 13, 2025, McCamish and the plaintiffs engaged in mediation, resulting in an agreement in principle.
Under the proposed settlement terms, McCamish has agreed to pay $17.5 million into a fund to settle the matters.
On December 18, 2025, the court granted the final approval on the settlement.
If the settlement is not appealed within 30 days, then it will become effective and resolve all allegations made in the class action lawsuits without admission of any liability.
